subcodes.first_line: O Lord! This handmaid hath believed in the Manifestation of Thy Self, hath detached herself from all else but Thee, and hath turned her face toward the countenance of Thy mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رب هذه امه آمنت بمظهر نفسک و انقطعت عما سواک و توجهت الی وجه رحمانیتک
